message: Autonomous work systems deployed — Night Shift (10pm), Afternoon Sprint (1pm), HEARTBEAT.md work queue active. 10 cron jobs total.
Stream 1 cold email campaign complete — 50 target businesses, 3 email sequences (15 emails), personalization framework, 30 subject lines, full sending strategy
Conglomerate name locked: The Vektor Corporation. Domain: thevektorcorp.com
Vektor branding v2 delivered — 5 logo concepts, Kiwi Green primary, 10 taglines
Unified Mission Control dashboard built — 3D + 2D + Schedule in one page
Stream 1 launch kit complete — business plan, Upwork/Fiverr listings, outreach templates, sample deliverable, ToS
Revenue Sprint greenlit — Stream 1 (AI Service Arbitrage) selected as first focus
Morning briefing moved to 6:30 AM daily, 7 days/week
Mission Control colors updated — unique color per agent with matching connection arrows
KlaseCo.com team page + project rosters updated with full C-suite
Conglomerate structure established — 8 C-suite departments, protocols, project contexts
Weekly security audit — secrets scan clean, .gitignore coverage OK, credentials secured
Infrastructure health check — all systems nominal, 8 cron jobs active
KlaseCo.com v2 — third person voice, accurate project metrics, Robinhood-style dashboard filters
2D Flowchart v2 — agent hierarchy fixed, project-specific teams, cleaner connections
KlaseCo.com scaffold complete — 16 pages, MDX pipeline, NextAuth, Recharts dashboard
3D Mission Control built — interactive Three.js command center with all projects and agents
GitHub backup repo created — KiwiKlase/workspace-backup, first push: 12 files
Memory system online — 2am consolidation + 3am backup check cron jobs created
Workspace initialized — SOUL.md, IDENTITY.md, MEMORY.md, USER.md created. Day one begins.
